problem: How to restore depleted agricultural soil microbiome rapidly at scale?
hypothesis: Combining Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator plant species with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
